title: Gouda Fondue
description: Enjoy the indulgent and comforting flavors of Swiss Gouda fondue with a delicate floral touch. Perfect for dipping tender bread and vegetables.

ingredients.name: Gouda cheese
ingredients.notes: Swiss Gouda is ideal for fondue

instructions: In a large bowl, combine grated Gouda cheese, minced garlic, and chopped fresh thyme.
Add dry white wine and stir until the cheese is fully melted and the mixture is smooth.
Transfer the fondue to a fondue pot or a small ceramic bowl and place it over a candle warmer or a low-heat source.
Serve the fondue with tender bread and vegetables for dipping.
Enjoy the indulgent and comforting flavors of Swiss Gouda fondue!
Note: Fondue is best served at a temperature between 105°F and 115°F (40°C to 46°C).
